arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Mikel Arteta confirms "significant" Martin Odegaard blow
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta confirms that captain Martin Odegaard will be out for a "while" with the "significant" ankle injury he suffered on international duty.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains when Martin Odegaard could return from 'significant' ankle injury
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Odegaard suffered the injury while on international duty against Austria but the medics have only now accurately the length of his lay-off because they were waiting on further checks

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Martin Odegaard out for ‘a while’ with ‘significant’ ankle damage
arts.sum: The midfielder suffered the injury on international duty with Norway and missed Sunday’s north London derby win at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Possible Arsenal line-ups vs Atalanta as Calafiori starts but Havertz benched
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Atalanta: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Nwaneri; Saka, Havertz, Sterling Kaynak’s Arsenal XI vs Atalanta - Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Jorginho, Rice, Trossard; Saka, Jesus, Sterling

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides update on injured star Martin Odegaard as he reveals injured Arsenal captain has suffered 'quite significant' ankle ligament damage - but refuses to give timescale on his return
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has provided a worrying update on captain Martin Odegaard's ankle injury, admitting the damage he sustained was significant.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Martin Odegaard suffers 'significant' ankle injury as Mikel Arteta offers bleak update
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard could be set for a lengthy spell on the sidelines as a result of the ankle injury that he suffered on international duty earlier this month

arts.ttl: Photo: Young Arsenal attacking full-back who delivers 'precisely-timed crosses' spotted in training pre-Atalanta
arts.sum: Arsenal, fresh from their North London derby triumph, have now turned their attentions to their first Champions League fixture of the season. The Gunners will...

arts.ttl: Why are Arsenal playing in the Champions League on a Thursday?
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side take on Atalanta in their first Champions League match of the 2024/25 campaign

arts.ttl: Arsenal owner Kroenke lands £3bn net worth boost after Arteta masterclass
arts.sum: Headlined by on-field success for LA Rams in NFL and Denver Nuggets winning the NBA, Kroenke's sports and entertainment (KSE) portfolio has started to boom. Arsenal are estimated to be worth around £2billion, a big increase over the past year, but still 10th in the global game.
